headline.purpose: Node names, major shell labels, and high-value operational titles.

title.purpose: Panel headers, drawer titles, section labels, and control groups.

body.purpose: Default UI text across dense controls and panels.

label.purpose: Small labels, table headers, and metadata headings.

mono.purpose: IDs, endpoints, model names, capacities, timings, and generated configuration.

shadows.name: control-glow
shadows.purpose: Quiet hover feedback for actionable controls.

shadows.name: overlay-lift
shadows.purpose: Floating command palette or modal content only.

motion.name: state-out
motion.purpose: Color, border, shadow, opacity, and background state changes.

motion.name: press-out
motion.purpose: Small translate feedback for pressed controls.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Decisive action or active navigation state using the live accent.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { border: 1px solid transparent; background: var(--color-accent); color: var(--color-accent-ink); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 7px 12px; font: 600 var(--density-type-annotation)/1 Inter Tight, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 140ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 90ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-accent) 88%, var(--color-foreground)); box-shadow: 0 0 14px color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-accent) 18%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Control
components.description: Low-emphasis utility action that appears on hover or active state.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { border: 1px solid transparent; background: transparent; color: var(--color-fg-dim); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 6px 8px; font: 500 var(--density-type-caption)/1.2 Inter Tight, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 90ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--color-panel-strong); color: var(--color-foreground); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: translateY(1px); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-accent) 10%, transparent); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: State marker that pairs color, dot, and text.
components.css: .ds-status-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-good) 30%, var(--color-background)); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--color-good) 18%, var(--color-background)); color: var(--color-good); border-radius: 999px; padding: 1px 8px; font: 500 var(--density-type-caption)/1.4 Inter Tight, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-status-pill span { width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 999px; background: currentColor; }

components.name: App Panel
components.description: Flat bordered section used for model catalogs, peer tables, and configuration nodes.
components.css: .ds-panel { overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); background: var(--color-panel); color: var(--color-foreground); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); font-family: Inter Tight, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel header { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-soft); padding: 10px 14px; font-size: var(--density-type-control); font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2px; } .ds-panel div { padding: 11px 14px; font-family: JetBrains Mono, ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: var(--density-type-caption-lg); color: var(--color-fg-dim); }

components.name: Command Input
components.description: Compact field used in command surfaces and technical forms.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 40px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); background: var(--color-background); color: var(--color-foreground); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 8px 12px; font: 400 var(--density-type-control)/1.4 Inter Tight, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-muted-foreground); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Primary Navigation Tab
components.description: Route tab pattern for Network, Chat, and Configuration.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: var(--nav-tab-gap); align-items: center; } .ds-nav a { border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--radius); padding: var(--nav-tab-pad-y) var(--nav-tab-pad-x); color: var(--color-fg-dim); text-decoration: none; font: 500 var(--nav-tab-font-size)/var(--nav-tab-line-height) Inter Tight, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav a:hover { background: var(--color-panel-strong); color: var(--color-foreground); } .ds-nav .ds-nav-active { background: var(--color-accent); color: var(--color-accent-ink); }

narrative.overview: MeshLLM should feel like a private operations room for local AI infrastructure: compact, exact, and built for repeated use under pressure. The product is not trying to charm users with assistant personality; it earns trust by making peers, models, routes, memory, and configuration visibly governable.
keyCharacteristics: Compact app density with readable hierarchy.
Flat bordered panels separated by tonal layers, not heavy shadows.
Sparse, meaningful accent use for selection, focus, routes, and live signals.
Mono metadata for IDs, model names, endpoints, timestamps, and capacities.
Light and dark themes with equal visual authority.

rules.name: The One Live Signal Rule
rules.body: Accent color marks current action, focus, route, or live state. Do not spend it on decoration.

rules.name: The Three Surface Rule
rules.body: Use only app background, panel, and inset panel for ordinary depth. If a fourth neutral appears, simplify the hierarchy first.

rules.name: The Machine Values Rule
rules.body: If a string is a model name, endpoint, ID, memory value, route, or timestamp, set it in mono. If it is instruction or explanation, keep it sans.

rules.name: The Flat Until Floating Rule
rules.body: Panels, rows, cards, and tables do not receive elevation at rest. Shadows mean an element is floating, live, or responding to input.

dos: Do use OKLCH tokens from src/styles/globals.css as the source of truth.
Do separate surfaces with borders, dividers, and tonal shifts before adding shadows.
Do keep accent use sparse and meaningful: active tabs, selected rows, focus states, routing paths, live indicators, and primary actions.
Do use mono type for model names, peer IDs, endpoints, VRAM values, latency, percentages, and generated config.
Do support light and dark as equal themes. Both must preserve precision, density, and composure.
Do pair status color with text labels or dots so meaning survives color-blind and low-contrast conditions.
donts: Don't make the product feel like a generic SaaS dashboard.
Don't drift into gaming-neon cyberpunk, holographic sci-fi, or loud AI magic styling.
Don't use oversized rounded chat bubbles, giant composers, or a conversation-first mobile messenger feel.
Don't rely on bright gradients, multicolor accents, oversized spacing, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't make dark mode feel like the only intentional theme.
Don't make capability disappear into dull enterprise software with gray sameness and weak hierarchy.
Don't use theatrical motion to imply intelligence; motion must clarify state, routing, or feedback.
Don't add side-stripe borders, gradient text, repeated identical card grids, or modal-first flows.
